title: Tips & Strategy
description: Improve your ZXSnake skills with practical advice for surviving longer, planning ahead, and achieving higher scores.

images.caption: Plan ahead, survive longer, and achieve higher scores.

sections.heading: Improve Every Game
paragraphs: ZXSnake rewards careful planning, quick reactions, and smart decisions. Every game gives you another opportunity to survive longer and improve your high score.
Small improvements in movement and planning quickly add up, helping you unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and climb the leaderboards.

featureShowcases.heading: Play Smarter, Survive Longer
featureShowcases.summary: Simple improvements in planning and movement can dramatically improve your performance.
body: ZXSnake rewards players who think ahead. Planning your route, avoiding unnecessary risks, and leaving yourself room to manoeuvre will help you survive much longer as your snake grows.
Whether you're chasing a new high score or competing with friends, every game is another opportunity to improve.
bullets: Stay calm as the snake grows.

image.caption: Every game is another opportunity to improve.

summary: Improve your planning, survive longer, and achieve higher scores with practical ZXSnake strategy.
